seo.title: AKU World — BEATROX Experiential Design
seo.description: An NFT Miami experiential event for AKU+FTX featuring projection-mapped environments, 3D body scanning for digital avatar minting, holographic displays, and live performances.

og.title: AKU World — NFT Miami Experiential Event
og.description: A multi-room immersive event in New York — projection mapping, 3D body scanning, holographic displays, and live music for AKU+FTX.

hero.headline: AKU World
hero.subheadline: A multi-room experiential event bringing a digital universe to life — projection mapping, 3D scanning, holographic displays, and live music, all under one roof.

metadata.type: NFT Miami Experiential Event, Immersive Environment

body.heading: Design Objective
body.content: Create a real-world space for the NFT Miami event that brings the AKU brand to life — featuring a projection-mapped environment in the main room, an interactive subway lobby, a merch room with 3D holographic displays, and a body scanner for creating and minting digital avatars. Host panel discussions, live music performances, and a patio bar for attendees. Custom fabrication of a large-scale helmet installation, as well as exterior signage, was also included in the project.

body.heading: Design Concept
body.content:
AKU World is centered around the character of Aku — a digital explorer on a mission to prove that no dream is too big and no obstacle is too large. Guests were invited to explore three virtual worlds created for the experience, including the opportunity to control a large custom helmet installation, choose their 'Inner Astronaut,' and create and mint their own digital avatar through a 4D body scan.

The projections and lighting in the space were linked to the live musical performances, creating a fully immersive and dynamic environment that responded in real time to the energy of the crowd.

body.heading: Key Features
items: Main room projection-mapped environment with Unreal Engine real-time content
Merch room with 3D holographic portal displays
4D body scanner for digital avatar creation and NFT minting
Live music performances synced to lighting and projection
